objective: Convert the repo from a single flat crate to a Cargo virtual workspace with cli/ as the sole member, keeping the grove binary and all tests green.
key_changes: Replace root Cargo.toml [package] content with a [workspace] table listing members = ["cli"] and resolver = "2"
Create cli/Cargo.toml carrying all current [package], [[bin]], [dependencies], and [profile.release] content
Move src/ → cli/src/ (8 source files, no content edits)
Fix DEV_REGISTRY constant in cli/tests/cli.rs: concat!(env!("CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR"), "/../registry") to reach the root-level dev stub
Update scripts/bump-version.sh to target cli/Cargo.toml for the package version perl edit
Cargo.lock stays at repo root (workspace-level lock); no duplication inside cli/
cargo build --release --locked and cargo test --release --locked must pass from repo root
cargo clippy -- -D warnings must be clean
